title: Iron‘s Spells: Spoken Sorcery(Ported)
description: A unofficial 1.20.1 port of Iron's Spells: Spoken Sorcery.
body:
This is an unofficial, personal port of Iron's Spells: Spoken Sorcery to Minecraft 1.20.1.
Original Author: https://www.curseforge.com/members/yelle_233/projects
Original Project Link: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-spoken-sorcery
Differences from the original: The mod includes some minor fixes for 1.20.1 compatibility.
Important:
· I do not own the original mod. 
· Please do not report bugs found in this version to the original author.
